---
title: "Lectures"
---

Each lecture comes in **two forms**, both built from the course library
[`libdpy`](https://github.com/applied-dp-course/pub_lib):

- a **presentation deck** — a notebook-first RevealJS slideshow with the prose trimmed to bullets
  and code hidden (each code slide is marked, and the code lives in the self-study notebook); and
- a **self-study notebook** — the full narrative plus all code, meant to be read and run.

## Available lectures

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->
### differential privacy

- **02 · Reconstruction attacks** — [presentation deck](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/notebook.ipynb) · [self-study notebook](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/learn.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/lectures/02-reconstruction/learn.ipynb) · apps: [reconstruction-2d-slab](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-2d-slab/), [reconstruction-3d-slabs](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)
- **03 · DP as Hypothesis Testing** — [presentation deck](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/slides.qmd) · [self-study notebook](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) · apps: [Gaussian privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/), [Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)

### hypothesis testing

- **03 · DP as Hypothesis Testing** — [presentation deck](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/slides.qmd) · [self-study notebook](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/learn.ipynb) · apps: [Gaussian privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-6197737a49/), [Multi-distribution privacy tradeoff](content/lectures/03-hypothesis_testing/apps/privacy-plot-norm-laplace-uniform-06b3767cd2/)

### reconstruction attacks

- **02 · Reconstruction attacks** — [presentation deck](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/notebook.ipynb) · [self-study notebook](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/learn.ipynb) · [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/applied-dp-course/website/blob/main/content/lectures/02-reconstruction/learn.ipynb) · apps: [reconstruction-2d-slab](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-2d-slab/), [reconstruction-3d-slabs](content/lectures/02-reconstruction/apps/reconstruction-3d-slabs/)
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED LECTURES -->

See the [schedule](schedule.qmd) for the current term's week-by-week plan.
